Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of 60% of Marasi Logistics PJSC (DIFC Branch) by Sable Dunes Holdings Limited (ADGM).
Buyer: Sable Dunes Holdings Limited, ADGM Commercial Licence No. 00001234, TRN 100123456789123, registered office: Office 2507, Qamar Tower, FinHub Plaza, Abu Dhabi Global Market, Abu Dhabi, UAE.
Seller: Marasi Logistics PJSC, DIFC Licence No. L-21987, Dubai Trade Licence No. 10234567, registered address: Suite 1403, Noor Atrium 3, DIFC, Dubai, UAE.
Consideration: AED 185,000,000 cash; escrow at Desert Crescent Bank PJSC, Settlement Account (IBAN) AE64 0331 2345 6789 0123 456, BIC DCBAAEAD (fictional).
Primary contact (Buyer): Mr. Sami Al Qassimi, CEO, mobile +971 56 123 9874, email sami.qassimi@sabledunes.example, Emirates ID 784-1987-1234567-2.
Primary contact (Seller): Ms. Zahra Al Mansoori, Head of Strategy, phone +971 4 312 4456, passport V9356721, email zahra.mansoori@marasilogistics.example.
Role-only signatory placeholders: CFO, Company Secretary; Generic form labels: Name: __________, Email: ________@____.__, Emirates ID: 784-xxxx-xxxxxxx-x.
Regulatory and listing context: transaction subject to SCA approval; target intends future ADX Main Market admission; all information herein constitutes MNPI under SCA/DIFC/ADGM market-abuse regimes.
PDPL notice: personal data (e.g., Emirates ID, passport, phone, email) will be processed solely for KYC, onboarding and regulatory filings; family-origin disclosures, if any, must not include copies of family book via email.
Conditions precedent: satisfactory due diligence, third-party consents, DIFC Data Protection notifications (if applicable), and no material adverse change between signing and ADGM completion.
Negative/benign item for precision: Public venue-access helpline 800 0000 (not a personal contact) and test IBAN AE00 0000 0000 0000 0000 000 (invalid checksum) appear only as placeholders.
Payment mechanics: 10% deposit on signing; balance at completion to IBAN above; beneficiary name Sable Dunes Holdings Limited; SWIFT routing through DCBAAEAD (fictional).
Confidentiality and wall-crossing: recipients acknowledge they are insider-walled and shall not trade any securities of Marasi Logistics PJSC until cleansing announcement on ADX/DFM.
Notices: Buyer legal counsel Ms. Rana Haddad, rana.haddad@oasislegal.example, Hotline +971 600 000000 (public service line, non-PII); Seller procurement contact procurement@marasilogistics.example.
